title: begonia fraseri
intro: Begonia fraseri, also known as Fraser's Begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. It is a rhizomatous perennial native to the tropical forests of Asia, with thick, fleshy stems and leaves that are rich in medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating skin irritations. The leaves of Begonia fraseri can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
